zh.lifeSummary: Gómez Ruiz Carrillo於1180年出生在西班牙。他和Dama De Carrillo至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Gómez Ruiz Carrillo于1180年出生在西班牙。他和Dama De Carrillo至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Ruiz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Jesus, Francisco, Luis, Miguel, Roberto, Pedro, Ramon, Jorge.
Spanish and Portuguese: patronymic from the personal name Ruy, a short form of Rodrigo .

variants.name: Ruisi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Santo, Angelo, Matteo, Carmela, Lorenzo, Pasquale, Vittorio.
Italian (Sicily): probably an Italianized form of Spanish   Ruiz  .

variants.name: Rodrigo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Elena, Rafael, Alfonso, Alicia, Angel, Araceli, Benardo, Carlos, Carlota, Cristina, Emilio.  Indian Devi, Dileep, Dilip, Gamini, Mahendra, Manoj, Sunil, Tilak.

Spanish and Portuguese: from the personal name Rodrigo, from ancient Germanic Hrōdrīc, a compound of hrōd ‘fame, renown’ + rīc ‘power, kingdom’. Rodrigo is one of the most important Spanish personal names of ancient Germanic origin. It was borne by the last of the Visigoth kings and by a Christian saint, Saint Roderick, one of the 9th-century martyrs of Córdoba. This surname is also found in and around some of the former Portuguese territories of western India.

variants.name: Ruis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Arturo, Carlos, Conception, Elba, Fernando, Jose, Josue, Juan, Jubenal, Lazaro, Lupe.
Spanish and Portuguese: variant of   Ruiz  .

nameMeanings.name: Carrillo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Carlos, Jesus, Manuel, Luis, Pedro, Francisco, Ruben, Miguel, Roberto, Mario.

Spanish: nickname for a person with some peculiarity of the cheek or jaw, Spanish carrillo. The word appears to be a diminutive of carro ‘cart, wagon’, and it has been suggested that the reference is to the movements of the jaw in chewing. The surname may also have denoted originally a bold or shameless person; for the semantic development compare Cheek .
Italian (Campania): probably from a diminutive of carro (see Carro ), unless it derives from the Spanish (see 1 above).

variants.name: Cheek
meanings: English: from Middle English cheeke (Old English cē(a)ce), used as a nickname for someone with some deformity or scar in the region of the cheek or jawbone. Compare Cheak and Chick .

nameMeanings.name: Gómez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘complete’ in Hebrew), borne by a son of Japheth and grandson of Noah. It is in occasional use in the United States. Gomer is also an English surname, derived from an Old English personal name composed of gōd ‘good’ + mǣr ‘famous’, and the given name may also be a transferred use of this.

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: Gómez Ruiz Carrillo was born in 1180, in Spain. He had at least 1 son with Dama De Carrillo.

fr.lifeSummary: Gómez Ruiz Carrillo est né en 1180, à Espagne. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Dama De Carrillo.

de.lifeSummary: Gómez Ruiz Carrillo wurde 1180 in Spanien geboren. Er hatte mit Dama De Carrillo mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Gómez Ruiz Carrillo è nato il nel 1180 nel Spagna. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Dama De Carrillo.

ja.lifeSummary: Gómez Ruiz Carrilloは1180年にスペインで生まれた。彼はDama De Carrilloとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Gómez Ruiz Carrillo(은)는 1180년 스페인에서 태어났다. 그는 Dama De Carrillo(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Gómez Ruiz Carrillo nasceu em 1180, em Espanha. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Dama De Carrillo.

ru.lifeSummary: Gómez Ruiz Carrillo родился в 1180 г. в местности Испания. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Dama De Carrillo.

es.lifeSummary: Gómez Ruiz Carrillo nació en 1180, en España. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Dama De Carrillo.
